polymarket.title: Will Ethereum dip to $1,500 by December 31, 2026?

polymarket_summary.summary:

Data: Only one market: "Will Ethereum dip to $1,500 by December 31, 2026?: Yes 38% (vol $261,094)". So probability of dip is 38%, implying 62% chance it stays above $1,500. So sentiment likely bullish (since majority think it won't dip). Provide reasons: 38% probability of dip, volume $261k, etc. Must start with one of those words. Choose "Bullish:".
